text: I feel a sense of curious detachment here, wandering through these slightly unfamiliar spaces. The intentionally modern design speaks of innovation and research, yet the angled perspectives and quiet atmosphere give the place a dreamlike, slightly unsettled quality. I find myself reflecting on how environments like these influence my sense of reality and perception. There is a tension between clarity and confusion, an invitation to question the intentions behind this constructed order. I wonder how these spaces would be reviewed—not only in terms of function, but for the strange feeling they leave within the observer.
